name: Potato Pancakes (No-fry Latkes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, blend all ingredients well using a wooden spoon or hands.
3. Coat two baking sheets with oil.
4. Drop 1/4 cupfuls of batter onto prepared sheets.
5. Press down with the back of the measuring cup or your dampened hand.
6. Bake for 15 minutes, then turn the pancakes over and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until browned all over.
7. Serve with applesauce or sour cream.
